title: Stop losing money to inflation 📉
description: Stop keeping all your cash in a savings account. Here is the roadmap to building real wealth through smart diversification and strategy. 🚀 #investing #wealthbuilding #financialfreedom #stocks #moneytips

slides.topSection: Left: Pile of cash, Right: Shrinking piggy bank, Center: Red X. Caption: Holding only cash loses purchasing power.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Stock chart, Right: Gold bar, Center: Green check. Caption: Assets grow faster than inflation.

slides.topSection: Left: One giant egg, Right: Single stock logo, Center: Red X. Caption: Putting all eggs in one basket.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Index fund icon, Right: Real estate icon, Center: Green check. Caption: Spreading risk across different assets.

slides.topic: market timing vs time in market
slides.topSection: Left: Panic sell button, Right: Stressful news feed, Center: Red X. Caption: Trying to predict the bottom.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Calendar icon, Right: Upward arrow, Center: Green check. Caption: Consistent growth over long periods.

slides.topSection: Left: Casino chips, Right: Hype-train meme coin, Center: Red X. Caption: Gambling on overnight moonshots.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Company balance sheet, Right: Dividend check, Center: Green check. Caption: Investing in proven value.

slides.topSection: Left: Person sleeping, Right: Empty wallet, Center: Red X. Caption: Starting too late kills growth.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Small seed, Right: Giant money tree, Center: Green check. Caption: Start early to compound wealth.

slides.topSection: Left: Huge single payment, Right: Market crash chart, Center: Red X. Caption: Investing everything at one peak.
slides.bottomSection: Left: Small monthly coins, Right: Steady line graph, Center: Green check. Caption: Fixed amounts every single month.
